allow: Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/c/tickets/db.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('users:', d.users?.length || 0\); console.log\('events:', d.events?.length || 0\); console.log\('tickets:', d.tickets?.length || 0\); console.log\('walletDevices:', d.walletDevices?.length || 0\); console.log\('pushDevices:', d.pushDevices?.length || 0\); const t = d.tickets?.[0] || {}; console.log\('sample ticket keys:', Object.keys\(t\)\); const e = d.events?.[0] || {}; console.log\('sample event keys:', Object.keys\(e\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('/c/tickets/node_modules/better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\(':memory:'\); console.log\('OK', db.prepare\('SELECT 1'\).get\(\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\(':memory:'\); console.log\('OK', db.prepare\('SELECT 1 as n'\).get\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('public/monitor.html','utf8'\);const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\);if\(!m\){console.log\('no scripts'\);process.exit\(0\)}for\(const s of m\){try{new Function\(s.replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\)\);console.log\('OK',s.length,'chars'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('ERR',e.message,s.slice\(0,80\)\)}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('public/dashboard.html','utf8'\);const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\);if\(!m\){console.log\('no scripts'\);process.exit\(0\)}for\(const s of m\){try{new Function\(s.replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\)\);console.log\('OK',s.length,'chars'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('ERR',e.message,s.slice\(0,200\)\)}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('public/dashboard.html','utf8'\);const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\);let ok=true;for\(const s of m\){try{new Function\(s.replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('ERR',e.message.slice\(0,120\)\);ok=false}}if\(ok\)console.log\('JS OK'\)")
Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); sharp\('pass-assets.pass/logo@2x.png'\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\(m.width, 'x', m.height, m.format\)\);")
